title: A4 Carry Folders 4 Pack Mixed Pastel Colours Document Wallet
features: [PLASTIC WALLETS] - A Pack of 4 A4 Folders Wallets, Plastic Document Files Popper Wallets. 3 Assorted Pastel Colours; Aqua, Purple & Pink.

[DURABLE MATERIAL]: These plastic wallets folders are made of polypropylene material; they are very durable, hard wearing, tear-resistant, and moisture-proof. The A4 files folder features a white button, which is easy to close the A4 plastic wallet to keep the contents secure

[IDEAL SIZE] - The size of plastic folders is 32.26 x 24 x 1.27 cm; slightly bigger than A4 to allow putting in more documents. Putting the documents in and out of the wallet folder is smooth and much easier. Each A4 plastic wallet got a fairly large capacity to hold up to 150 sheets of A4 papers.
[CONVENIENCE] – The A4 wallets are very convenient for students to keep the storage of courses' notes. Different color files can be used for each course to differentiate from the other files/courses.

[SUITABLE]: Plastic Folders are also very useful for travelling along with others lots of paperwork and documents. The documents and paperwork of bank, car, insurance, work, photos, art work, etc can be stored into separate folders.
